summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable violates core task requirements. Script itself uses `set -euo pipefail`, proper error handling, pinned actions (✓), but solution is ~30% complete. Missing entirely: bats-core test files, test fixture files (tests/fixtures/*.conf, *.txt), bats installation in workflow, test execution step (workflow has no `bats tests/` invocation), act-result.txt artifact generation (required per spec), YAML structure validation, and actionlint pass verification. Workflow references nonexistent fixtures and only demonstrates script once instead of running comprehensive test suite. Task explicitly requires red/green TDD, fixture mocks, all tests via act with parsed output, and act-result.txt as artifact—none present.
